name: Paymentus Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a leading provider of cloud-based bill payment technology and solutions. We deliver our next-generation product suite through a modern technology stack to a broad and diverse base of business and financial institution clients. Our platform was used by approximately 53 million consumers and businesses globally in December 2025 to pay their bills, make money movements and engage with our clients. We serve billers of all sizes that primarily provide non-discretionary services...
